positioning.ai: AI Product Manager with 7+ years building production-grade AI systems. Experienced in LLM applications, agentic workflows, RAG systems, recommendation engines, and eval-driven development. Built and shipped a multi-agent job application system with deterministic planning, per-bullet truthfulness guards, and fixture-based CI gating.
positioning.technical: Technical Product Manager building API-first, cloud-native integration platforms. Experienced in RESTful APIs, webhook-driven architectures, event-driven systems, authentication layers, schema governance, and backward-compatible versioning. Shipped platforms that reduced lead-to-meeting time by 25% and cut campaign go-live by 50%.
positioning.growth: Growth-focused Product Manager with a track record of driving 3x MAU growth, 18% conversion improvement via A/B testing frameworks, and 5x organic growth through modular CMS and analytics platforms.
positioning.agentic: Implementation-focused PM designing, deploying, and scaling agentic workflows using n8n orchestration, LLM-powered pipelines, and structured integration layers across CRM, communication, CMS, and analytics platforms.
